data.title_en: Invocation for someone who does good to you

items.chapter_title_en: Invocation for someone who does good to you
items.english_text: (If someone does you a favour and you say: (May Allah reward you with goodness.) then you have indeed excelled in praising him.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (If someone does you a favour and you say: (Jazakal-lahu khayran.) then you have indeed excelled in praising him.)
